user_prompt: test idea: a cinematic drone flyover of a futuristic wind farm at sunrise

style_bible.visual_style: Cinematic realism with vibrant sunrise colors, high detail on futuristic wind turbines, subtle atmospheric haze
style_bible.camera_rules: Camera remains outside and around turbines, smooth continuous movements, no abrupt cuts, no human presence
style_bible.lighting_rules: Warm directional sunrise light with soft shadows, slight lens flare, natural ambient fill
style_bible.continuity_rules: Maintain same futuristic wind farm environment and turbine model across all scenes, consistent lighting angle and color temperature

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Establish a wide cinematic flyover of a futuristic wind farm at sunrise, showing multiple sleek turbines turning slowly.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- primary subject: futuristic wind turbines with aerodynamic blades
- environment: open grassy plains with low rolling hills under a clear sky at sunrise
- explanatory state:
  - Scene 1: baseline condition (observation)

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: wide shot, turbines centered and spread across the frame
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: slow dolly forward and slight pan from left to right
- subject & action: turbines begin slow rotation, blades catching early sunlight reflections
- environment details: dew-covered grass, distant hills, soft orange sky
- lighting: warm directional sunrise light from left, soft shadows
- cinematic look: high contrast with warm tones, shallow depth of field on foreground blades

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium shot focusing on a cluster of three turbines
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow crane upward revealing more turbines in background
- subject & action: blades continue smooth rotation, subtle wind indicated by slight grass movement
- environment details: mist near ground, clear sky gradient
- lighting: consistent warm directional light, subtle lens flare
- cinematic look: naturalistic with vibrant colors

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: close medium shot on a single turbine blade sweeping through frame
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow pan following blade tip motion
- subject & action: blade tip moves smoothly, catching golden light reflections
- environment details: softly blurred turbines in background, sky brightening
- lighting: warm, directional, soft shadows
- cinematic look: crisp detail on blade surface textures

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.camera: Starts with slow dolly forward and pan left to right, then slow crane upward, ending with slow pan following blade tip
scenes.audio_cue: Here we see a futuristic wind farm at sunrise, with sleek turbines slowly turning in the gentle morning breeze, setting the stage to understand how these turbines harness wind energy.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Reveal the aerodynamic airflow around turbine blades, visualizing wind speed and pressure differences causing rotation.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- primary subject: futuristic wind turbines with aerodynamic blades
- environment: open grassy plains with low rolling hills under a clear sky at sunrise
- explanatory state:
  - Scene 2: mechanism revealed (cause)

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium close-up on a single turbine blade from side angle
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow pan along blade length
- subject & action: animated translucent airflow lines flow over and under blade, color-coded by speed (blue to red gradient)
- environment details: softly blurred turbines and sky background
- lighting: warm directional light highlighting blade edges
- cinematic look: semi-transparent airflow visualization with glowing effect

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on blade cross-section with pressure zones visualized
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: pressure zones appear as shaded areas on blade surface (blue low pressure above, red high pressure below), arrows indicating force direction
- environment details: minimal background, focus on blade
- lighting: directional warm light with subtle rim highlights
- cinematic look: scientific visualization style integrated naturally

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium shot showing entire turbine with airflow lines wrapping around blades
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow orbit around turbine
- subject & action: airflow lines accelerate on blade top surface, decelerate below, causing torque and rotation
- environment details: sunrise sky, distant turbines blurred
- lighting: consistent warm directional light
- cinematic look: blend of realism and illustrative airflow visualization

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.camera: Starts with slow pan along blade length, then static close-up, ending with slow orbit around turbine
scenes.audio_cue: The wind flows over the blades, creating pressure differences: lower pressure above and higher below, generating lift that causes the blades to spin and convert wind energy into mechanical motion.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show the effect of turbine rotation producing electrical energy, highlighting power generation and grid connection.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- primary subject: futuristic wind turbines with aerodynamic blades
- environment: open grassy plains with low rolling hills under a clear sky at sunrise
- explanatory state:
  - Scene 3: outcome explained (effect)

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium wide shot of multiple turbines spinning faster as wind increases
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow dolly backward revealing power lines extending from turbines
- subject & action: turbines accelerate rotation, power lines vibrate slightly
- environment details: sunrise sky brightening, grass swaying
- lighting: warm directional light
- cinematic look: naturalistic with dynamic motion blur on blades

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on turbine base showing electrical cables and glowing power converters
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow tilt upward from base to nacelle
- subject & action: cables pulse with subtle light indicating electricity flow
- environment details: metallic turbine base details, ground vegetation
- lighting: warm with subtle reflections
- cinematic look: high detail with soft glow effects

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: wide shot showing turbines connected to a distant electrical grid infrastructure
- lens: 24mm
- camera movement: slow pan right to left
- subject & action: power lines connect turbines to grid, sun rising fully on horizon
- environment details: transmission towers, clear sky
- lighting: bright warm sunrise light
- cinematic look: crisp clarity with vibrant colors

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.camera: Starts with slow dolly backward, then slow tilt upward, ending with slow pan right to left
scenes.audio_cue: As the blades spin faster, mechanical energy converts into electricity, transmitted through power lines to the grid, delivering clean energy to homes and businesses.
